title: psychotria lucens subsp. lucens
intro: Psychotria lucens subsp. lucens is a subspecies of the Psychotria genus, a type of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the "shiny leaf". This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Psychotria lucens subsp. lucens include antimicrobial, antioxidant, and wound-healing activities, which can help to promote overall health and well-being. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption and utilization in traditional medicine.
